SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class Services

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Services
All Implemented Interfaces:
TermServices, LogicServices, ProofServices
public class Services extends Object implements TermServices, LogicServices, ProofServices
This is a collection of common services to the KeY prover. Services include information on the underlying Java model and a converter to transform Java program elements to logic (where possible) and back.

    • copy

      public Services copy(boolean shareCaches)
      creates a new services object containing a copy of the java info of this object and a new TypeConverter (shallow copy) The copy does not belong to a Proof object and can hence be used for a new proof.
      Parameters:
      shareCaches - true The created Services will use the same ServiceCaches like this instance; false the created Services will use a new empty ServiceCaches instance.
      Returns:
      the copy

    • copy

      public Services copy(Profile profile, boolean shareCaches)
      Creates a copy of this Services in which the Profile is replaced. The copy does not belong to a Proof object and can hence be used for a new proof.
      Parameters:
      profile - The new Profile to use in the copy of this Services.
      shareCaches - true The created Services will use the same ServiceCaches like this instance; false the created Services will use a new empty ServiceCaches instance.
      Returns:
      The created copy.

    • copyPreservesLDTInformation

      public Services copyPreservesLDTInformation()
      creates a new service object with the same ldt information as the actual one

    • setProof

      public void setProof(Proof proof)
      Marks this services as proof specific Please make sure that the Services does not yet belong to an existing proof or that it is owned by a proof environment. In both cases copy the InitConfig via InitConfig.deepCopy() or one of the other copy methods first.
      Parameters:
      proof - the Proof to which this Services instance belongs

      public Counter getCounter(String name)

      returns the namespaces for functions, predicates etc.

      Returns:
      the proof specific namespaces

      public void setNamespaces(NamespaceSet namespaces)

      Specified by:
      getCaches in interface ProofServices
      Returns:
      The used ServiceCaches.

    • getTermBuilder

      public TermBuilder getTermBuilder(boolean withCache)
      Returns either the cache backed or raw TermBuilder used to create JTerms. Usually the cache backed version is the intended one. The non-cached version is for use cases where a lot of intermediate terms are created of which most exist only for a very short time. To avoid polluting the cache it is then recommended to use the non-cache version
      Specified by:
      getTermBuilder in interface TermServices
      Returns:
      The TermBuilder used to create JTerms.

    • getTermBuilder

      public TermBuilder getTermBuilder()
      Returns the TermBuilder used to create JTerms. Same as getTermBuilder(true)>.
      Specified by:
      getTermBuilder in interface TermServices
      Returns:
      The TermBuilder used to create JTerms.

    • getTermFactory

      public TermFactory getTermFactory()
      Returns the TermFactory used to create JTerms.
      Specified by:
      getTermFactory in interface TermServices
      Returns:
      The TermFactory used to create JTerms.

      sets the factory for origin term labels
